native.query:
SELECT
  wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND wp.primary_key NOT IN (
    SELECT
      wpa.project_id
    FROM
      public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
    WHERE
      wpa.activity_updated_at >= (
        DATE_TRUNC('week', (NOW() + INTERVAL '-1 week') + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day'
      )
      AND wpa.activity_updated_at < (
        DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW() + INTERVAL '1 day') - INTERVAL '1 day'
      )
  )
ORDER BY
  wp.project_name DESC
LIMIT 1048575;

SELECT
  wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND wp.primary_key NOT IN (
    SELECT
      wpa.project_id
    FROM
      public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
    WHERE
      wpa.activity_updated_at >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
      AND wpa.activity_updated_at < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
  )
ORDER BY
  wp.project_name DESC
LIMIT 1048575;

SELECT
  DISTINCT wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
JOIN
  public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
  ON wp.primary_key = wpa.project_id
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND wpa.activity_updated_at >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
  AND wpa.activity_updated_at < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY
  wp.project_name DESC
LIMIT 1048575;

native.query:
SELECT
  "public"."api_result"."id" AS "id",
  "public"."api_result"."text" AS "text",
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  "public"."api_result"."query_id" AS "query_id",
  "public"."api_result"."created_date" AS "created_date",
  "public"."api_result"."is_synced" AS "is_synced",
  "public"."api_result"."video_id" AS "video_id",
  "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel__title"
  -- Optionally, aggregate comment information:
  -- , COUNT("Youtube Automation Videocomments - Query"."id") AS "NumberOfComments"
FROM
  "public"."api_result"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_videocomments" AS "Youtube Automation Videocomments - Query" ON "public"."api_result"."query_id" = "Youtube Automation Videocomments - Query"."query_id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_analysedvideos" AS "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video" ON "public"."api_result"."video_id" = "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_monitoredchannels" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel" ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."channel_id" = "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."id"
WHERE
  (
    "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" IS NOT NULL
  )
  AND (
    (
      "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" <> ''
    )
    OR (
      "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" IS NULL
    )
  )
  AND (
    "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."title" = 'Millard Ayo'
  )
GROUP BY
  "public"."api_result"."id",
  "public"."api_result"."text",
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment",
  "public"."api_result"."query_id",
  "public"."api_result"."created_date",
  "public"."api_result"."is_synced",
  "public"."api_result"."video_id",
  "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel__title"
LIMIT 1048575;

SELECT
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment" AS "sentiment",
  count(DISTINCT "public"."api_result"."id") AS "count"
FROM
  "public"."api_result"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_analysedvideos" AS "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"
    ON "public"."api_result"."video_id" = "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_videocomments" AS "Youtube Automation Videocomments"
    ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."id" = "Youtube Automation Videocomments"."video_id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."youtube_automation_monitoredchannels" AS "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"
    ON "Youtube Automation Analysedvideos - Video"."channel_id" = "Youtube Automation Monitoredchannels - Channel"."id"
WHERE
  (
    "public"."api_result"."sentiment" <> 'Language detection failed.'
    OR "public"."api_result"."sentiment" IS NULL
  )
  AND (
    "public"."api_result"."sentiment" <> 'Language not supported.'
    OR "public"."api_result"."sentiment" IS NULL
  )
GROUP BY
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment"
ORDER BY
  "public"."api_result"."sentiment" ASC;

SELECT
  count(
    distinct "Weris Projects - project_name"."unique_id"
  ) AS "count"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      wp.project_name AS "project_name"
    FROM
      public.weris_projects AS wp
    WHERE
      wp.is_active = TRUE
      AND wp.primary_key NOT IN (
        SELECT
          wpa.project_id
        FROM
          public.weris_project_activity AS wpa
        WHERE
          -- Activity overlaps current week (start or end falls within the week)
          (
            wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
            AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
          )
      )
    ORDER BY
      wp.project_name DESC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_projects" AS "Weris Projects - project_name"
  ON "source"."project_name" = "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_name"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_project_activity" AS "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_project_technologies" AS "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN "public"."weris_technologies" AS "Weris Technologies - Technology"
  ON "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."technology_id" = "Weris Technologies - Technology"."primary_key"
WHERE
  (
    "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_status" <> 'ON_HOLD'
    OR "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_status" IS NULL
  )

SELECT
  count(distinct "source"."project_name") AS "count"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      DISTINCT wp.project_name AS "project_name"
    FROM
      public.weris_projects AS wp
      JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS wpa 
        ON wp.primary_key = wpa.project_id
    WHERE
      wp.is_active = TRUE
      AND (
        wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
        AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
      )
    ORDER BY
      wp.project_name DESC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_projects AS "Weris Projects - project_name"
  ON "source"."project_name" = "Weris Projects - project_name"."project_name"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Activity - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_project_technologies AS "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"
  ON "Weris Projects - project_name"."primary_key" = "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."project_id"
LEFT JOIN public.weris_technologies AS "Weris Technologies - Technology"
  ON "Weris Project Technologies - Primary Key"."technology_id" = "Weris Technologies - Technology"."primary_key"

SELECT
  DISTINCT wp.project_name AS "project_name"
FROM
  public.weris_projects AS wp
  JOIN public.weris_project_activity AS wpa 
    ON wp.primary_key = wpa.project_id
WHERE
  wp.is_active = TRUE
  AND (
    wpa.activity_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND wpa.activity_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())

ORDER BY

SELECT

FROM

SELECT
  "source"."_mb_row_id",
  "source"."name",
  "source"."age",
  CASE
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN '0-20'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40'
    WHEN "source"."age" >= 41 THEN '41+'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS "age_group"
FROM (
  SELECT
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."_mb_row_id",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."name",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."age"
  FROM
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"
) AS "source"
ORDER BY "source"."age";

SELECT
  "source"."age_group" AS "age_group",
  "source"."count" AS "count",
  "source"."remark" AS "remark"
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN "age" BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN '0-20'
      WHEN "age" BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30'
      WHEN "age" BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40'
      WHEN "age" >= 41 THEN '41+'
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS "age_group",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "_mb_row_id") AS "count",
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT "remark", ', ') AS "remark"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."_mb_row_id" AS "_mb_row_id",
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."age" AS "age",
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."remark" AS "remark"
    FROM
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"
  ) AS "source"
  GROUP BY
    "age_group"
  ORDER BY
    "age_group" ASC
) AS "source"
LIMIT 1048575;

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN '41-50'
    WHEN "source"."age" >= 51 THEN '51+'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS "age_group",
  "source"."remark" AS "remark",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "source"."_mb_row_id") AS "count"
FROM (
  SELECT
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."_mb_row_id" AS "_mb_row_id",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."name" AS "name",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."age" AS "age",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."exam_date" AS "exam_date",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."venue" AS "venue",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."region" AS "region",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."exam_type" AS "exam_type",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."marks" AS "marks",
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."remark" AS "remark"
  FROM
    "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"
) AS "source"
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN '41-50'
    WHEN "source"."age" >= 51 THEN '51+'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END,
  "source"."remark"
ORDER BY
  "age_group" ASC,
  "source"."remark" ASC;

SELECT
  "source"."name" AS "name",
  CASE
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40'
    WHEN "source"."age" BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN '41-50'
    WHEN "source"."age" >= 51 THEN '51+'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS "age_group"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."name" AS "name",
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"."age" AS "age"
    FROM
      "PUBLIC"."candidate_results_report_2025_3_20250430182446"
  ) AS "source"
ORDER BY
  "age_group" ASC,
  "name" ASC

native.query:
SELECT
  "name",
  SUM("amount") AS "total_amount"
FROM
  "public"."m_koba_6_20250709130516"
WHERE
  "type" = 'App share'
  OR "type" = 'App share on behalf'
  OR "type" = 'Buy share other network'
  OR "type" = 'Buy shares'
  OR "type" = 'initiate share price change'
GROUP BY
  "name"
ORDER BY
  "name" ASC

SELECT
  NAME,
  SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_LOAN,
  SUM(AMOUNT) * 0.10 + SUM(AMOUNT) AS FINAL_LOAN
FROM
  PUBLIC.M_KOBA_6_20250709130516
WHERE
  TYPE = 'Emergency Loan'
  OR TYPE = 'Development Loan'
GROUP BY
  NAME
ORDER BY
  NAME ASC
LIMIT
  1048575

SELECT
  name,
  SUM(amount) AS sum_amount
FROM
  public.m_koba_10_20250709161908
WHERE
  type IN ('App share', 'App share on behalf', 'Buy share other network', 'Buy shares')
GROUP BY
  name
ORDER BY
  name ASC

SELECT
  name,
  SUM(amount) AS sum
FROM
  public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
WHERE
  type = 'App loan repayment'
  OR type = 'App loan repayment on behalf'
  OR type = 'Loan Payment other member'
  OR type = 'Loan Payment'
GROUP BY
  name
ORDER BY
  name ASC

SELECT
    t.name,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
                 AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
                 AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
                 AND (
                     (t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA' AND t.amount = 20000)
                     OR (t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE' AND t.amount = 20000)
                     OR (t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA' AND t.amount = 200000)
                     OR (t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI' AND t.amount = 250000)
                     OR (t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA' AND t.amount = 30000)
                     OR (t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA' AND t.amount = 10000)
                     OR (t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI' AND t.amount = 36000)
                     OR (t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA' AND t.amount = 20000)
                     OR (t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI' AND t.amount = 15000)
                     OR (t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO' AND t.amount = 20000)
                 )
                THEN t.amount
            WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
                THEN t.amount
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS sum
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date)
        name,
        amount,
        type,
        date
    FROM
        public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE
        type IN (
            'App loan repayment',
            'App loan repayment on behalf',
            'Loan Payment',
            'Loan Payment other member',
            'Other Member Penalty Payment',
            'Penalty Payment'
        )
) t
GROUP BY
    t.name
ORDER BY
    t.name ASC

SELECT
  source.name AS name,
  FLOOR(source.final_loan / 750000.0) * 750000.0 AS final_loan,
  COALESCE(loan_repayment.loan_repayment, 0) AS loan_repayment,
  source.final_loan - COALESCE(loan_repayment.loan_repayment, 0) AS "Remained Loan"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      name,
      SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
      SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
    FROM
      public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE
      type = 'Emergency Loan'
      OR type = 'Development Loan'
    GROUP BY
      name
    ORDER BY
      name ASC
    LIMIT
      1048575
  ) AS source
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
            AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
            AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
            AND (
              (t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA' AND t.amount = 200000)
              OR (t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI' AND t.amount = 250000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA' AND t.amount = 30000)
              OR (t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA' AND t.amount = 10000)
              OR (t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI' AND t.amount = 36000)
              OR (t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI' AND t.amount = 15000)
              OR (t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO' AND t.amount = 20000)
            ) THEN t.amount
          WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount
          ELSE 0
        END
      ) AS loan_repayment
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date) name,
          amount,
          type,
          date
        FROM
          public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
        WHERE
          type IN (
            'App loan repayment',
            'App loan repayment on behalf',
            'Loan Payment',
            'Loan Payment other member',
            'Other Member Penalty Payment',
            'Penalty Payment'
          )
      ) t
    GROUP BY
      t.name
    ORDER BY
      t.name ASC
  ) AS loan_repayment
ON source.name = loan_repayment.name
GROUP BY
  source.name,
  source.final_loan,
  loan_repayment.loan_repayment
ORDER BY
  source.name ASC,
  FLOOR(source.final_loan / 750000.0) * 750000.0 ASC
LIMIT 1048575

SELECT
  "source"."name" AS "name",
  "source"."sum" AS "Total Repayment",
  "Total Loan - name"."total_loan" AS "Total Loan",
  "Total Loan - name"."final_loan" AS "Final_Loan",
  ("Total Loan - name"."final_loan" - "source"."sum") AS "Remained LRoan"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      t.name,
      SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
            AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
            AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
            AND (
              (t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA' AND t.amount = 200000)
              OR (t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI' AND t.amount = 250000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA' AND t.amount = 30000)
              OR (t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA' AND t.amount = 10000)
              OR (t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI' AND t.amount = 36000)
              OR (t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA' AND t.amount = 20000)
              OR (t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI' AND t.amount = 15000)
              OR (t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO' AND t.amount = 20000)
            ) THEN t.amount
          WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount
          ELSE 0
        END
      ) AS sum
    FROM
      (
        SELECT DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date)
          name,
          amount,
          type,
          date
        FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
        WHERE type IN (
          'App loan repayment',
          'App loan repayment on behalf',
          'Loan Payment',
          'Loan Payment other member',
          'Other Member Penalty Payment',
          'Penalty Payment'
        )
      ) t
    GROUP BY t.name
    ORDER BY t.name ASC
  ) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      name,
      SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
      SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
    FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE type = 'Emergency Loan'
      OR type = 'Development Loan'
    GROUP BY name
    ORDER BY name ASC
    LIMIT 1048575
  ) AS "Total Loan - name" ON "source"."name" = "Total Loan - name"."name"
LIMIT 1048575

SELECT
  "source"."name" AS "name",
  "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
  "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
  "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
  "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
  CASE
    WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" < 100000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 1
    WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" <= 660000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 3
    WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" >= 670000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 6
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "monthly repayment"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "source"."name" AS "name",
      "source"."sum" AS "Total Repayment",
      "Total Loan - name"."total_loan" AS "Total Loan",
      "Total Loan - name"."final_loan" AS "Final_Loan",
      ("Total Loan - name"."final_loan" - "source"."sum") AS "Remained LRoan"
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          t.name,
          SUM(
            CASE
              WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
                AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
                AND t.date < '2025-04-01'
                AND (
                  (t.name = 'AGATHA MGANGA' AND t.amount = 20000)
                  OR (t.name = 'ALBERT SAWE' AND t.amount = 20000)
                  OR (t.name = 'JOE CHAMBUA' AND t.amount = 200000)
                  OR (t.name = 'HAMFREY ANTONI' AND t.amount = 250000)
                  OR (t.name = 'JOHNSON MWAKILEMA' AND t.amount = 30000)
                  OR (t.name = 'WABEYA WABEYA' AND t.amount = 10000)
                  OR (t.name = 'GLORY KUNDI' AND t.amount = 36000)
                  OR (t.name = 'MODESTA MWASHALA' AND t.amount = 20000)
                  OR (t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI' AND t.amount = 15000)
                  OR (t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO' AND t.amount = 20000)
                ) THEN t.amount
              WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount
              ELSE 0
            END
          ) AS sum
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date) name,
              amount,
              type,
              date
            FROM
              public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
            WHERE
              type IN (
                'App loan repayment',
                'App loan repayment on behalf',
                'Loan Payment',
                'Loan Payment other member',
                'Other Member Penalty Payment',
                'Penalty Payment'
              )
          ) t
        GROUP BY
          t.name
        ORDER BY
          t.name ASC
      ) AS "source"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
          name,
          SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
          SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
        FROM
          public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
        WHERE
          type = 'Emergency Loan'
          OR type = 'Development Loan'
        GROUP BY
          name
        ORDER BY
          name ASC
        LIMIT 1048575
      ) AS "Total Loan - name" ON "source"."name" = "Total Loan - name"."name"
    LIMIT 1048575
  ) AS "source"
LIMIT 1048575

SELECT
  "source"."name" AS "name",
  "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
  "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
  "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
  "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
  "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
  "Share_name"."total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
  CASE
    WHEN "source"."Total Loan" >= 2000000 THEN "Share_name"."total_amount" / share_totals.sum_total_amount * loan_ten_percent.sum_ten_percent
    ELSE 0
  END AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    "source"."name" AS "name",
    "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
    "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
    "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
    "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
    CASE
      WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" < 100000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 1
      WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" <= 660000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 3
      WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" >= 670000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 6
      ELSE NULL
    END AS "monthly repayment"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      "source"."name" AS "name",
      "source"."sum" AS "Total Repayment",
      "Total_Loan_name"."total_loan" AS "Total Loan",
      "Total_Loan_name"."final_loan" AS "Final_Loan",
      ("Total_Loan_name"."final_loan" - "source"."sum") AS "Remained LRoan"
    FROM (
      SELECT
        t.name,
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN t.type IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment')
             AND t.date >= '2025-02-01'
             AND t.date < '2025-04-01'

                OR (t.name = 'JOYCE KURESOI' AND t.amount = 15000)
                OR (t.name = 'NAISILIGAKI KIVUYO' AND t.amount = 20000)
              ) THEN t.amount
            WHEN t.type NOT IN ('Penalty Payment', 'Other Member Penalty Payment') THEN t.amount

          END
        ) AS sum
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT ON (name, amount, type, date)

          amount,
          type,
          date

          'App loan repayment',
          'App loan repayment on behalf',
          'Loan Payment',
          'Loan Payment other member',
          'Other Member Penalty Payment',
          'Penalty Payment'
        )
      ) t
      GROUP BY t.name
      ORDER BY t.name ASC
    ) AS "source"
    LEFT JOIN (
      SELECT
        name,
        SUM(amount) AS total_loan,
        SUM(amount) * 0.10 + SUM(amount) AS final_loan
      FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
      WHERE type = 'Emergency Loan'
         OR type = 'Development Loan'
      GROUP BY name
      ORDER BY name ASC
      LIMIT 1048575
    ) AS "Total_Loan_name" ON "source"."name" = "Total_Loan_name"."name"
    LIMIT 1048575
  ) AS "source"
  LIMIT 1048575
) AS "source"
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    name,
    SUM(amount) AS total_amount
  FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
  WHERE type IN (
    'App share',
    'App share on behalf',
    'Buy share other network',
    'Buy shares',
    'initiate share price change'
  )
  GROUP BY name
  ORDER BY name ASC
) AS "Share_name" ON "source"."name" = "Share_name"."name"
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS sum_total_amount
  FROM (
    SELECT name, SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE type IN (
      'App share',
      'App share on behalf',
      'Buy share other network',
      'Buy shares',
      'initiate share price change'
    )
    GROUP BY name
  ) a
) share_totals
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT SUM(ten_percent) AS sum_ten_percent
  FROM (
    SELECT SUM(amount) * 0.10 AS ten_percent
    FROM public.m_koba_6_20250709130516
    WHERE type = 'Emergency Loan'
       OR type = 'Development Loan'
    GROUP BY name
  ) b
) loan_ten_percent

      "source"."Share - name__total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
      "source"."Distributed(Gawio)" AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          "source"."name" AS "name",
          "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
          "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
          "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
          "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
          "source"."monthly repayment" AS "monthly repayment",
          "Share_name"."total_amount" AS "Share - name__total_amount",
          CASE
            WHEN "source"."Total Loan" >= 2000000 THEN "Share_name"."total_amount" / share_totals.sum_total_amount * loan_ten_percent.sum_ten_percent
            ELSE 0
          END AS "Distributed(Gawio)"
        FROM

              "source"."Total Repayment" AS "Total Repayment",
              "source"."Total Loan" AS "Total Loan",
              "source"."Final_Loan" AS "Final_Loan",
              "source"."Remained LRoan" AS "Remained LRoan",
              CASE
                WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" < 100000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 1
                WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" <= 660000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 3
                WHEN "source"."Remained LRoan" >= 670000 THEN "source"."Remained LRoan" / 6
                ELSE NULL
              END AS "monthly repayment"

                  "Total_Loan_name"."total_loan" AS "Total Loan",

                      ) AS sum
                    FROM
